description_long: This bench features a long, rectangular wooden seat with a natural, light wood grain finish. The seat is supported by two pairs of curved metal legs, each set forming an X-shape for stability and modern aesthetic appeal. The legs are metallic, likely steel or aluminum, and are finished in a matte or brushed texture, contrasting with the warm wood above. The bench lacks both a backrest and armrests, emphasizing a minimalist, functional design suitable for communal or public spaces. Its sturdy construction suggests it can accommodate multiple users at once. The overall look is contemporary, making it ideal for parks, plazas, or urban sidewalks.
description: A minimalist wooden bench with a rectangular seat and X-shaped metal legs, designed for public or outdoor use. The bench has no backrest or armrests, emphasizing a modern, functional style.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the narrow profile of the wooden seat and the X-shaped metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the wooden seat and both pairs of curved metal legs.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, mirroring view 0, with the same narrow profile and X-shaped legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the full length and both sets of metal legs.
attribute_leg_design: two pairs of curved X-shaped metal legs
